titlebar.welcome_sub: Press your hotkey anytime to open the module menu.
titlebar.run_on_startup_desc: Start automatically in the background when Windows boots.
titlebar.auto_updates_desc: Check for updates every time the app launches.
titlebar.hotkey_desc: Press a combination to open the quick action menu anywhere.
titlebar.language_desc: Interface language. Applies instantly to every screen.
updater.checking_sub: Establishing a secure connection to the BurnedWolf network…
updater.available_sub: An updated build is ready. Installing only takes a few seconds and your settings will be preserved.
updater.installing_sub: Please don't close the window — this only takes a moment.
updater.uptodate_sub: BurnedWolf is up to date. Redirecting to the main interface…
updater.error_sub: Check your internet connection and try again. The app can't continue without verifying the update channel.
exit.title: Terminating Session
exit.sub: Closing secure tunnels and clearing network hooks…
exit.footer: It's safe to close — all background processes will be terminated.
onboard.lang_sub: Pick the language you want BurnedWolf to use. You can change it later in settings.
onboard.update_sub: Should BurnedWolf check for updates automatically on every launch? You can change this later in settings.
onboard.update_yes_desc: Recommended. Always run the latest features and security fixes.
onboard.update_no_desc: Skip the update check at startup. You can still update manually anytime.
onboard.footer: Welcome to BurnedWolf · Setting things up
spotlight.empty: No modules found matching your query.
spotlight.module_dpi_desc: Open the DPI shield control panel.
spotlight.module_verify_desc: Open file verification and repair tool.
spotlight.warning_banner: Your game might be running in exclusive fullscreen mode. Switch to 'Borderless Windowed' for seamless overlay.
dpi.isp_hint_default: Recommended profiles are marked with ★ in the dropdown.
dpi.isp_hint_unknown: Public IP lookup failed. Pick a profile manually from the dropdown.
dpi.failover_hint: Rotate to next recommended profile if Discord becomes unreachable.
dpi.failover_hint_disabled: Needs a known ISP with multiple recommended profiles.
dpi.terminal_ready: BurnedWolf shield module ready. Awaiting command.
dpi.whitelist_desc: Hostlist-Auto is active. Shield will only trigger on specified or automatically detected blocked domains.
dpi.tr_master_desc: Bundled list of Turkey-blocked / throttled domains (Discord, Roblox, YouTube, X, Mega, Twitch, Reddit, VPN sites). Applied as a second hostlist alongside your own — DPI bypass only triggers on these targets, leaving the rest of the web full-speed.
dpi.analysis_desc: Tests every profile against Discord, YouTube, X, Roblox, and Twitch — both HTTP/HTTPS and voice UDP. Synthesizes a custom mutation if no built-in profile passes (Deep mode only).
dpi.analysis_terminal_ready: System ready for analysis. Pick a scan mode above.
discord.new_login_desc: Your account details are stored locally on this device only.
discord.saved_desc: A secure identity has been previously configured on the system.
verify.title: System Integrity Check
verify.desc: Verifies your local installation against the original server files. Repairs any missing or corrupt components automatically.
verify.repaired_count: System firewall renewed. A total of {n} files were repaired.
verify.integrity_ok: Integrity verified at 100%. All files are original and no intervention was required.
